scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm prisma:generate && corepack pnpm -r --if-present typecheck
scripts.prisma:generate: corepack pnpm --dir packages/database prisma generate --config prisma.config.ts
scripts.prisma:validate: corepack pnpm --dir packages/database prisma validate --config prisma.config.ts
scripts.prisma:format: corepack pnpm --dir packages/database prisma format --config prisma.config.ts
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy: corepack pnpm --dir packages/database prisma migrate deploy --config prisma.config.ts
scripts.db:seed: corepack pnpm --dir packages/database prisma db seed --config prisma.config.ts
